arts.ttl: Arsenal icons agree on Marcus Rashford as Man Utd star admits he wants to leave
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford's Manchester United career appears to be drawing to a close, and two Arsenal legends have confessed their desire to see the forward don the Gunners' jersey . According to former Gunners Bacary Sagna and Emmanuel Petit, Arsenal could be the perfect landing spot for Rashford.

arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres' response will have Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta licking his lips
arts.sum: "I genuinely think he's a good footballer, he works really hard, all of that," said Deeney of Gyokeres during a recent appearance on talkSPORT. Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta will be a fan of what Viktor Gyokeres had to say in light of Troy Deeney rubbishing his reputation as a "natural finisher."

arts.ttl: Everything spotted in Arsenal training before Crystal Palace amid Rice absence
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta has been working his players hard in training ahead of facing Crystal Palace twice this week. Despite Arteta confirming that Rice has not suffered an injury, he appeared to be missing from Tuesday's indoor and outdoor training drills ahead of Palace.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim breaks silence on Marcus Rashford Man Utd transfer comments amid Arsenal rumours
arts.sum: Even though Rashford indicated his wish to end his 20-year association with United, Amorim instead referred to the "new challenge" of making the club a credible force again. Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim suggested he would be happy to keep Marcus Rashford despite the forward's desire for a "new challenge" away from the club.

arts.ttl: Arsenal drop double early team news hint for Crystal Palace as Mikel Arteta faces triple dilemma
arts.sum: The latter has started the last two games while Partey came off the bench for the final 21 minutes against Everton William Saliba meanwhile, has been absent just twice this season and welcomed back Gabriel Magalhaes alongside him over the weekend after he missed the last few weeks with injury. Mikel Arteta is facing a number of huge decisions for this evening's Carabao Cup quarter-final against Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal emerge as favourites to sign 'sensational' Chelsea player who only joined for £30m last summer
arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea have done a handful of transfer deals between them over the years in the Premier League. While Raheem Sterling’s loan deal was...

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace boss Oliver Glasner hails 'fantastic' £183,000-a-week Arsenal man ahead of Carabao Cup clash
‘I’ve been told’: Arsenal could look at signing £4m Leeds United player in January – journalist
arts.sum: The January transfer window is just around the corner, and Arsenal could be busy this winter. Indeed, the Gunners do have a few positions in...

arts.ttl: Dusan Vlahovic sends Mikel Arteta a transfer message
arts.sum: Dusan Vlahovic sent Arsenal and Mikel Arteta a transfer message on Tuesday evening with a fantastic goal and impressive performance for Juventus . Vlahovic’s display will have impressed Arsenal manager Arteta, who is heavily reported to be weighing up a January bid for the player.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta provides injury update on key midfielder ahead of Carabao Cup quarter-final
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has spoken about Declan Rice's availability ahead of the quarter-final against Crystal Palace.
